zh.lifeSummary: 當John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn於1495年9月3日出生在英國薩默塞特萊頓時，他的父親Richard Carpenter25歲，母親Susan Trevelyan23歲。他於1517年與Elizabeth Mountfort在英國薩默塞特巴林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年5月10日在英國越可爾奧斯特費爾德享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn was born on 3 September 1495, in Wrington, Somerset, England, his father, Richard Carpenter, was 25 and his mother, Susan Trevelyan, was 23. He married Elizabeth Mountfort in 1517, in Barrington, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 10 May 1540, in Austerfield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Wrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn est né le 3 septembre 1495, à Wrington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Carpenter, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Susan Trevelyan, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mountfort en 1517, à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1540, à Austerfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Wrington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

September 1495 in Wrington, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Carpenter 25 und seine Mutter Susan Trevelyan 23. Er hat 1517 in Barrington, Somerset, England Elizabeth Mountfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. ja.lifeSummary: John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwynが1495年9月3日にイギリスソメルセトウリントンで生まれた時，父Richard Carpenterは25歳，母Susan Trevelyanは23歳であった。1517年にイギリスソメルセトバーリントンでElizabeth Mountfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年5月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアアウステルフィールドで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn(이)가 1495년 9월 3일 영국 서머세트 링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Carpenter(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Susan Trevelyan(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1517년 영국 서머세트 배링턴에서 Elizabeth Mountfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 5월 10일 영국 요르크실르 오스터필드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 링턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Robert William Carpenter Sir, of Dilwyn родился 3 сентября 1495 г. в местности рингтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Carpenter было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Susan Trevelyan, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mountfort в 1517 г. в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 мая 1540 г. в местности аустирфиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности рингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
